textByHash.017da28c9e7a042a918083f09898a4e9e311bbd4: True. A very important thing to remember! Now be gone!
textByHash.393df8f1ee302aadb4376eeeff3173c4577a6eeb: You give up too easily, but have it your way.
textByHash.42fcf4c32ea25bfe91f8d37515c94cb06cbebec2: I bet I can beat you to the other end of this island, I'll take the left route and you can take the right.
textByHash.cc3c76442a8f84a7e79e906e2aa74fea663d6159: Noooo! How could you beat me?
textByHash.d1b482bd5c7caf6f05aacab2831503ab62b658ca: Oh, hello? Looks like you'll probably want to start again.
textByHash.d68e594177ee7a296652df7241607d5cff6e9059: Woo hoo! Ha ha! You can try again if you want, but you'll never beat me, I'm far too fast!
textByHash.db8bff5ee10cd379fdba834affb15ccd98c6a7fd: Well, that's life I'm afraid, it's never as easy as you would like, you have to take the path that's dealt!
textByHash.ea43b7ec2f5d7d06003fad9dd795b45d3e2e2215: You'll see, so how about it?
